judgment.summary: High-growth, high-margin business with exceptional capital efficiency and massive free cash flow.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS beat estimates by 3.5% (2.01 vs 1.94), with the next earnings date scheduled for 2026-07-30.
positives: Return on equity 141.5% — demonstrates exceptional capital efficiency.
Free cash flow (TTM) $101.09B — provides massive liquidity.
Earnings growth 21.8% — shows strong year-over-year expansion.
Profit margin 27.2% — reflects high-quality, profitable operations.
negatives: Price/Book 41.20 — indicates a very high valuation relative to book value.
PEG ratio 2.58 — suggests valuation is expensive relative to growth.
Quick ratio 0.91 — implies limited immediate liquidity to cover short-term liabilities.
Trailing P/E 36.25 — reflects a high multiple relative to earnings.

news.paragraph: Apple is navigating conflicting analyst views as Evercore ISI raised its price target to $365 while KeyBanc expressed caution regarding the stock's stretched valuation. Traders should also weigh competitive pressures from Google alongside macroeconomic themes involving China and the impact of potential tariffs.
